reasoning: Bitcoin has traded significantly above the $50,000 threshold throughout 2025. Historical data shows that prices started the year around $90,000-$100,000 and reached an all-time high of approximately $126,000 in October 2025. As of the forecast date (November 9, 2025), Bitcoin is trading at approximately $117,000. For the price to hit $50,000 before December 31, 2025, it would need to drop more than 55% in less than two months, which is statistically improbable for a major asset like Bitcoin outside of a total market collapse. Furthermore, no evidence of any 1-minute flash crashes reaching $50,000 on Binance Global (the resolution source) has been reported for the year 2025 thus far. The lowest documented price point found for 2025 was approximately $75,000 during a Q3 correction. Thus, the likelihood of a dip to $50,000 or below is extremely low.
